title: AuditReport
description: Shared response schema for all structural audit API calls. Returned by audit-statement, audit-proof, and audit-stub prompts.

audit_type.description: Which audit prompt produced this report.

label.description: The LaTeX label of the audited item (e.g. def:upper-bound, thm:cauchy-criterion, prf:cauchy-criterion).

stub.description: True if the proof is a TODO stub.

checks.description: One entry per block checked, in block-registry order.

block_id.description: The block id from block-registry.yaml (e.g. standard_quantified_stmt).

requirement.description: Requirement level for this artifact type from artifact-matrix.yaml.

finding.description: One-sentence description of the finding. Empty string if PASS or CONDITIONAL_UNMET or DEPENDENT_UNMET.

trigger_evaluation.description: For C-type blocks only: explanation of whether the trigger condition was met and why. Omit for R, D, N blocks.

proof_usage_evaluation.description: For negated_quantified_stmt and contrapositive_quantified_stmt only: explanation of whether proof_usage is true for this concept.

violations.description: All non-passing findings collected for quick review. Subset of checks.

special_flags.description: Flags that require human attention but are not block-level failures.

description.description: Human-readable description of the flag, including location and suggested resolution.

location.description: File and approximate line or environment where the flag was detected.

suggested_form.description: For MISSING_PREDICATE / MISSING_NOTATION / MISSING_RELATION: the suggested canonical form. Empty string otherwise.
